prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-GAOSK-14PC-35X1-ORNG Product Type: SEWING_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: Gear Aid Outdoor Sewing Kit Description: Proclaim yourself an honorary gear surgeon.

Don't let a rip, tear, puncture or failed seam turn your trip around. Use this specialized Outdoor Sewing Kit to perform high quality surgery on your tents, jackets, sleeping bags, packs, either at home or in the field. With Gear Aid, anyone can be a master of gear repair.

A hole in your jacket or sleeping bag doesnt let the insulation do its job. This Outdoor Sewing Kit comes with everything you need to get your gear out of intensive care with high quality threads and needles to repair all sorts of fabrics, and a seam ripper to open seams cleanly, something no multi-tool can accomplish. Search Terms: travel sewing kit outdoor gear repairs Features: - Comes with an expert repair guide - Travel sized container - Great for tents, jackets, sleeping bags and more === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Travel Sized, Tent And Jacket Repair, Seam Ripper, Expert Guide Included

openai.title_differentiation: Travel Sized Container, Repair Guide Included, High Quality Thread And Needles, For Tents Jackets Sleeping Bags And Packs
